name: quant-research
description: v1.0 — Protocol skill for agent-driven quantitative finance research. Two strict disciplines (R&D / Pure Research) with mode-specific entry documents (Heilmeier charter / PR/FAQ + AEA-style pre-registration), two-layer decomposition (Core Technologies + Capabilities) with TRL maturity and lifecycle, Cooper-style stage-gates, A0-A5 analysis-depth tier as primary deliverable, integration pattern (Pattern 1/2/3) declared in charter, and unified two-axis review (process + conclusion) replacing the separate experiment-review skill.

interface.shortDescription: Quant finance research protocols for Codex
interface.longDescription: v1.0 — Protocol skill for agent-driven quantitative finance research. Two strict disciplines: R&D mode (Heilmeier charter, two-layer decomposition with TRL maturity + lifecycle, Cooper-style stage-gates per capability, integration pattern declared upfront) and Pure Research mode (Working Backwards PR/FAQ, AEA-style hash-locked pre-registration, explanation-pruning ledger, IMRAD-shaped manuscript draft). Analysis depth (A0-A5 tier system) is the primary deliverable. Promotion gates require both process review and conclusion review pass with concrete evidence cited. v1.0 removes the standalone experiment-review skill (folded into the unified review structure).
